authors.author: Billy Funk
Billy Funk
Der König lebt (preist ihn, den Auferstandnen)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v1 v1 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Worship the king Worship the king We are in his presence to magnify his name when we seek his face glory fills this place as we worship the King

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Worship the king Worship the king we are in his presence to magnify his name when we seek his face glory fills this place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As we worship the King As we worship the King As we worship the King
